requirements: R1: exists(tree, 'scan customer identity') and executed_by(tree, 'scan customer identity', 'database') and activity_receives(tree, 'scan customer identity', 'customerIdentity')
R2: leads_to(tree, 'scan customer identity', 'store identity check history') and activity_sends(tree, 'store identity check history', 'identityCheckHistory')

R3: condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'accountBalance < 0 and not (negativeBalanceApproved == true or customerType == "VIP")', 'terminate') and exists(tree, 'approve negative balance') and executed_by(tree, 'approve negative balance', 'bank manager')
